---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect and share the reproduction steps
labels: bug
---

## Summary
Provide a short description of the issue you encountered.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. First step to reproduce the issue
2. Second step
3. Additional steps if needed

## Expected Result
Describe what should have happened under normal behaviour.

## Actual Result
Explain what actually happened. Attach screenshots or logs when available.

## Impacted Areas
- List the affected areas (e.g., `apps/desktop`, `apps/desktop/src-tauri`, `packages/ui`, `packages/stores`, etc.).
- Note any specific deployment environments, OS versions, or hardware where the issue occurs.

## Additional Details
Share environment details (`OS`, `Node`, `pnpm`, `Rust`, app version, etc.) and any other context that will help the investigation.
